ddls:
CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the group is part of */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor managing the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was last updated */,
  "min_students" INTEGER /* Minimum number of students allowed in the group */,
  "min_preferred_students" INTEGER /* Preferred minimum number of students in the group */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the group */,
  "max_preferred_students" INTEGER /* Preferred maximum number of students in the group */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of the group (e.g., study group, project group) */,
  "group_status" TEXT /* Status of the group (e.g., Active, Inactive, Archived) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the group */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the course belongs to */,
  "syllabus_url" TEXT /* URL of the course syllabus */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Level of the course (e.g., 100, 200, 300) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "dean_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dean of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the instructor (e.g., Professor, Lecturer) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student was enrolled */,
  "current_gpa" TEXT /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the adviser of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_adviser_id FOREIGN KEY ("adviser_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "enrolled_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student was enrolled in the group */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Active, Withdrawn) */,
  "enrollment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the student's enrollment in the group */,
  "enrollment_method" TEXT /* Method of enrollment (e.g., Manual, Auto) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_enrollments_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "min_preferred_students" INTEGER /* Preferred minimum number of students in the group */,
  "max_preferred_students" INTEGER /* Preferred maximum number of students in the group */,
  "set_by" TEXT /* User who set the preferences */,
  "set_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preferences were set */,
  "preference_reason" TEXT /* Reason for setting the preferences */,
  "preference_status" TEXT /* Status of the preferences (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_preferences_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical change */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Created, Updated, Deleted) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "change_status" TEXT /* Status of the change (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_history_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, Instructor, Student) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Track if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)
